The question is asking to determine the most recent (last) season played among the given seasons. Since the seasons are listed chronologically, we can sort the data based on the "season" column which contains date-type values (years). By using the f_sort_column(season) operation with the order "large to small", we can easily find the last season played appearing at the top of the sorted column.

The last season played is the one with the most recent year in the table. Based on the extracted sub-table, the season "2012–13" is the most recent one listed. Therefore, the answer is that the last season played was 2012–13.
